member.name: T:FortuneCookies.FortuneCookie
member.summary: Cracks open a fortune cookie and returns literary quotes and colours by lucky number.

member.name: M:FortuneCookies.FortuneCookie.GetFortune(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a literary quote for the given lucky number.

member.name: M:FortuneCookies.FortuneCookie.GetAuthor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the author of the quote for the given lucky number.

member.name: M:FortuneCookies.FortuneCookie.GetLuckyColor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a lucky colour for the given lucky number.

member.name: M:FortuneCookies.FortuneCookie.CrackOpen(System.Int32)
member.summary: Cracks open the full fortune cookie and returns all fields.
